function.name: getDelegatedTaskStatus
function.description: Check the status and current result of a delegated sub-agent task.

TaskId.description: The delegated task id returned by delegateTask.

WaitForCompletion.description: When true, wait briefly in the runtime until the delegated task finishes or the timeout is reached.

TimeoutSeconds.description: Optional wait timeout in seconds when WaitForCompletion is true.

PollIntervalSeconds.description: Optional polling interval in seconds when WaitForCompletion is true.
